headline: Omnicom's Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Increase Year Over Year
summary: OMC Q1 earnings miss but revenues beat, with strong year-over-year growth and steady margins shaping a mixed quarterly performance.

headline: Omnicom Group Inc (OMC) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Revenue Growth and Strategic ...
summary: Omnicom Group Inc (OMC) reports robust financial performance with significant revenue growth and strategic integration successes, despite challenges in advertising and increased interest expenses.

headline: Omnicom (OMC) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: John Wren: Thank you, Greg, and good afternoon, everyone.  As you'll recall from our fourth quarter call and Investor Day, we've strategically repositioned our portfolio for growth.  As part of the portfolio realignment, we identified planned asset sales and disposition of businesses with approximately $3.2 billion of annual revenue, of which approximately $1 billion was disposed of in the first quarter.

raw.headline: Omnicom (OMC) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
raw.summary: John Wren: Thank you, Greg, and good afternoon, everyone.  As you'll recall from our fourth quarter call and Investor Day, we've strategically repositioned our portfolio for growth.  As part of the portfolio realignment, we identified planned asset sales and disposition of businesses with approximately $3.2 billion of annual revenue, of which approximately $1 billion was disposed of in the first quarter.

headline: Omnicom Group Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Omnicom Group (NYSE:OMC) executives highlighted early integration progress following the closing of its acquisition of Interpublic just before the holidays, pointing to portfolio reshaping, expanding client relationships, and a lift in profitability in the company’s first quarter 2026 earnings call.
